ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_segment" TEXT /* Market segment the company is part of */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the market data belongs to */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Current market price of the company's stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Current market capitalization of the company */,
  "p_b_ratio" REAL /* Current price-to-book ratio of the company */,
  "p_e_ratio" REAL /* Current price-to-earnings ratio of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Current earnings per share of the company */,
  "roe" REAL /* Current return on equity of the company */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the current day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the current day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the current day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the current day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_market_data" (
  "historical_market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical market data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the historical market data belongs to */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Market price of the company's stock on a specific date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company on a specific date */,
  "p_b_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio of the company on a specific date */,
  "p_e_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the company on a specific date */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the company on a specific date */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on equity of the company on a specific date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the historical market data was recorded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on a specific date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on a specific date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on a specific date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on a specific date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on a specific date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_market_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_segments" (
  "market_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market segment */,
  "market_segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the market segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market segment */,
  "parent_segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industry" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company belongs to */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the industry is the primary industry for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sector" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sector is the primary sector for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_market_segment" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "market_segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market segment the company belongs to */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the market segment is the primary market segment for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "market_segment_id")
)
